elements.original_description: A stark black-and-white yin-yang symbol, perfectly balanced, on a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon. A stark, perfectly balanced yin-yang symbol in pure black and white on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. The design is precise and symmetrical, with sharp edges and a minimalist aesthetic. The overall mood is stark and clear, emphasizing balance and simplicity.
